texto: A long walk is a slow remembering of how profound and wonderful life is
autor: God is everywhere and in everything. Wherever I look I am looking at God.
explicacao: Citação de God is everywhere and in everything. Wherever I look I am looking at God. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “A long walk is a slow remembering of how profound and wonderful life is” articula reflexao, edie-littlefield-sundby, remembering em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
